productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Red Daypack Backpack
description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your stuff in style with this Yogear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories and books, the bag is best suited for college and general heavy duty use. Height: 44 cm Width: 36 cm Made of jacquard fabric with PU coating One main compartment with zipper closure Vertical zippered compartment with mesh overlays EVA padding for back support Fabric haul loop Two adjustable shoulder straps Wash care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
